name: VenTheZone-pi-dots
description: All the skills you'll need for AI-powered development with pi-coding-agent. 60+ skills covering research, content, project management, debugging, and more. Includes external-scout for implementation plans, dynamic model providers (OpenRouter, NVIDIA NIM), and comprehensive tooling for modern development workflows.
